name: m181-yarn-v1-optional-fixture
description: Milestone 181 US1 fixture — yarn v1 project where the root depends on chokidar (runtime) and lodash (runtime); chokidar in turn declares fsevents as optional (see yarn.lock's `chokidar` entry which has an `optionalDependencies:` sub-block naming fsevents). mikebom's yarn v1 classifier MUST mark fsevents as LifecycleScope::Optional based on the yarn.lock structure.
